notes: Recurring generosity-day shock; overlaps Black Summer bushfire season and December giving.
Approximate national-attention anchor during the 2019/20 bushfire response. Use as descriptive only because appeals started earlier and continued for months.
Liquidity-support announcement. Expected sign is intentionally loose: extra liquidity could raise generosity, but uncertainty could suppress it.
JobSeeker Coronavirus Supplement starts. Good candidate for liquidity-without-charity-spillover screening.
Unscheduled global day of giving and unity in response to COVID-19.
Australian Red Cross Ukraine appeal launch. Overlaps eastern Australia floods.
Australia Unites telethon for QLD/NSW floods. Strong overlap with Ukraine appeal.
